mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_STRUCT_DIAG_HISTORY ( DIAG_ID, DS_ID, SCHEMA_NM, DIAG_DT, PREV_COLLECT_DT, TOTAL_TABLES, TOTAL_COLUMNS, ADDED_TABLES, ADDED_COLUMNS, MODIFIED_COLUMNS, DELETED_TABLES, DELETED_COLUMNS, CRET_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{diagId}, #{dsId}, #{schemaNm}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{prevCollectDt}, #{totalTables}, #{totalColumns}, #{addedTables}, #{addedColumns}, #{modifiedColumns}, #{deletedTables}, #{deletedColumns}, #{cretUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.DIAG_ID, h.DS_ID, h.SCHEMA_NM, h.DIAG_DT, h.PREV_COLLECT_DT, h.TOTAL_TABLES, h.TOTAL_COLUMNS, h.ADDED_TABLES, h.ADDED_COLUMNS, h.MODIFIED_COLUMNS, h.DELETED_TABLES, h.DELETED_COLUMNS, h.CRET_USER_ID, dm.DM_NM AS DATA_MODEL_NM FROM TB_STRUCT_DIAG_HISTORY h LEFT JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL dm ON dm.DM_DS_ID = h.DS_ID ORDER BY h.DIAG_DT DESC

SELECT DIAG_ID, SEQ, TABLE_NM, COLUMN_NM, CHANGE_TYPE, PREV_DATA_TYPE, CURR_DATA_TYPE, PREV_DATA_LEN, CURR_DATA_LEN, PREV_NULLABLE, CURR_NULLABLE FROM TB_STRUCT_DIAG_DETAIL WHERE DIAG_ID = #{diagId} ORDER BY TABLE_NM, SEQ

SELECT h.DIAG_ID, h.DS_ID, h.SCHEMA_NM, h.DIAG_DT, h.PREV_COLLECT_DT, h.TOTAL_TABLES, h.TOTAL_COLUMNS, h.ADDED_TABLES, h.ADDED_COLUMNS, h.MODIFIED_COLUMNS, h.DELETED_TABLES, h.DELETED_COLUMNS, h.CRET_USER_ID FROM TB_STRUCT_DIAG_HISTORY h WHERE h.DIAG_ID = #{diagId}

SELECT a.OBJ_NM AS "tableNm", a.ATTR_NM AS "columnNm", a.DATA_TYPE AS "dataType", a.DATA_LEN AS "dataLen", a.NULLABLE_YN AS "nullableYn", a.DM_CLCT_ID AS "clctId" FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_ATTR a WHERE a.DM_CLCT_ID = ( SELECT c.DM_CLCT_ID FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT c WHERE c.DM_ID = #{dataModelId} AND c.CLCT_CMPTN_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.CLCT_END_DT DESC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY a.OBJ_NM, a.ATTR_NM
